title: Molecular Biology Master Program Application and Fees
content:
Molecular Biology Master Program Application and Fees

By clicking on the headings below,

Molecular Biology Master Program Application and Fees

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Video Contents

Click for the Online Pre-Registration Link

ALES Score Type:

TUITION FEES:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-ucretleri

Dear Students,

According to the enrollment status of our principal students who are eligible for final enrollment and of the principal students who are eligible for the reserve list, our students who have the right to enroll as a principal come to the Çarşı Campus 3rd Floor Science Graduate School Secretariat with the originals of their application documents and after completing and signing the relevant form, they are sent to the accounting unit after student affairs. are required to complete their transactions.

In the 2024-2025 Fall  Semester, there will be no science exam in programs with Thesis/Non-Thesis;

In our thesis programs, 65% of the ALES in the relevant score type, 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average,

In without-thesis programs, 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade and 50% of the relevant score type ALES, if any, will be taken.

If the candidates applying to without-thesis programs do not have the ALES scores, 55 points will be accepted and ranking will be made according to that.

Head of Molecular Biology Department:

Prof. Dr. Emel SERDAROĞLU KAŞIKÇI

E-mail: emel.serdaroglukasikci@uskudar.edu.tr

In the admission of the students to the Program, the items related to the admission of the Graduate Education and Training Regulation will be taken as basis. Students who are graduates of biology, medicine, pharmacy, veterinary medicine of the relevant universities will be able to apply to the program. To graduate from the master's program, to collect at least 21 credits in two years (4 semesters). They will also reinforce the laboratory knowledge and culture that will participate in the studies in the laboratory lesson.

1- Application petition

2- Diploma (authentic or certified example)

3- Certified copy of the identity card

5- Transcript

6- Reference Letter is not required

(ALES - minimum score of 55 from Math and Science area) OSYM Exam Result document itself or computer output. (ALES score is not required for the non-thesis program students.)

* Thesis fee is included in Master and Doctorate programs.

Thesis graduate program fee includes 4 semesters.

The Master's program fee without thesis covers 3 semesters.

If the duration of the above-mentioned training periods is extended, a scholarship course fee is charged for each semester.
